mapping_policy: Associate every drawing object with the record in the same source column-group and row; preserve overlapping drawings, drawing order, repeated artwork, and missing-image records exactly.
render_policy: Keep the original factory cube geometry for Excel and perspective-rectify only top/front/right for fixed-camera mixed scene use; reduce broad baked studio lighting, apply the locked fine-print deblock pass, and raise chroma by 5.5 percent without redrawing print details; apply the approved balanced-clear pass and lightly blend internal high-frequency blocks.

texture_profile.name: fine_print_v4_balanced_smooth
texture_profile.geometry_policy: Preserve source artwork, line positions, and face registration exactly.

camera_policy: Fixed near-front camera showing only top/front/right.

structured_redraw_profile.name: source_faithful_semantic_vector_v1
structured_redraw_profile.policy: Factory pattern and color are redrawn as fixed vector geometry; no raster enlargement or AI pattern generation.
